title: O-Four
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=O-Four
RC-1304 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Niner's squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''O-Four''', also known by the number '''RC-1304''',{{CSWECite|III|84|RC-}} was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. He was created by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] cloners on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] for use in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Trained as a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]], he was made a member of [[Niner's squad]], serving alongside fellow commandos [[DD]] and [[Sev (Niner's squad)|Sev]] under [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] [[Niner Skirata|Niner]]. The squad was deployed to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|first battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the fight O-Four, DD and Sev were all killed, leaving Niner as the only member of Lambda. The sergeant later wished he had sent O-Four west with an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]] during the battle. Like all clone troopers, O-Four was 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall. ==Behind the scenes== O-Four was first mentioned in ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' a [[2004]] novel written by [[Karen Traviss]]. He later received mention in ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', another book in the same [[Republic Commando|series]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|RC-1304}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=O-Four }} [[Category:Clone commandos]] [[Category:Males]]
